year.rationale: Helps to contextualize the research in time.

abstract.rationale: Provides a concise overview of the research focus.

venue.rationale: Indicates where the research was published.

problem_statement.rationale: Clarifies the significance and context of the research.

methodology.rationale: Essential for understanding the approach taken.

method_type.description: Type of method (e.g., deep learning, retrieval-based)

architecture.rationale: Specifies the technical framework of the method.

training_data.rationale: Indicates the source of information for the model.

evaluation_metrics.rationale: Important for measuring the success of the approach.

experiments.rationale: Provides insights into the practical application of methods.

experiment_design.rationale: Clarifies how the experiments were structured.

results.rationale: Summarizes the outcomes of the research.

comparison_with_baselines.description: Comparison of results with baseline methods
comparison_with_baselines.rationale: Helps to contextualize the performance of the proposed method.

challenges.rationale: Highlights areas needing further research and improvement.

future_directions.rationale: Guides subsequent research efforts in the field.

reproducibility_metadata.description: Information to ensure reproducibility of results

code_availability.description: Whether the code is available for public use

dataset_access.description: Whether the datasets used are publicly available
dataset_access.rationale: Essential for verifying results and methods.

experiment_details.rationale: Provides necessary steps for others to follow.
